name: ZXSnake
description: ZXSnake is a retro-inspired snake game with simple controls, classic arcade pacing, score chasing, achievements, and visuals inspired by early home computer games.

name: ZXBrick
description: ZXBrick is a retro brick-breaking arcade game inspired by classic bat-and-ball gameplay with power-ups, achievements, and high-score chasing.

name: ZXSpace
description: ZXSpace is a retro space shooter inspired by classic alien invasion arcade games with score chasing and wave-based gameplay.

name: ZXPong
description: ZXPong is a retro-inspired bat-and-ball arcade game with simple controls, classic rally gameplay, score chasing, achievements, and fast pick-up-and-play action.

name: GameOfDarts
description: GameOfDarts is a modern darts scoring app for iPhone and iPad designed for score tracking, statistics, practice, and local multiplayer gameplay.

name: StudioDash
description: StudioDash is an analytics and business intelligence platform for independent developers, creators, and small studios, bringing App Store Connect, Cloudflare, AdMob, AdSense, Search Console, GitHub, and other services into one native workspace.
